schema.title: Response Read Users Api V1 Users  Get
Response Read Projects Api V1 Projects  Get
Response Read Project Documents Api V1 Documents Project  Project Id  Get

post.description:
Validate the document exists and belongs to this org/project, then
dispatch the BRD generation to a Celery worker.  Returns a task_id
that the frontend can poll via GET /documents/task/{task_id}/status.

get.description:
Poll the status of a Celery task.
Possible states: PENDING | STARTED | SUCCESS | FAILURE

post.description:
Upload a .txt or .docx file, extract its text, create a document record, and dispatch a Celery task to generate a BRD from the extracted text.

Poll the returned task_id via GET /documents/task/{task_id}/status.

400.description: Bad Request – unsupported file type or empty content

post.description:
Upload a BRD document (.txt or .docx), extract its text, create a document record, and dispatch a Celery task to generate test cases from the BRD text.

Poll the returned task_id via GET /documents/task/{task_id}/status.

200.description: Test case generation task dispatched successfully

400.description: Bad Request – unsupported file type or empty content

schema.title: Response Read Project Test Cases Api V1 Test Cases Project  Project Id  Get

post.description: Read the BRD text from document_id and dispatch the test case generation Celery task.

get.description: Exports test cases across the project into an Excel sheet.
